name: Watcher Eye
description: Tiny floating eye. Sees more than it should.

name: Tendril Seer
description: Eye-stalk horror that lashes with prehensile tendrils.

name: Brimstone Fiend
description: Blue-skinned, trident-armed lesser demon. Hits hard, dies hard.

name: Hellforged Reaper
description: Tall, scythe-wielding devil. Walks slow. Reaps fast.

name: Glutinous Elder
description: Bloated blue slime patriarch. Splits when struck.

name: Acid Patriarch
description: Caustic green slime mass. Corrodes armor and patience.

name: Primordial Ooze
description: Ancient golden slime. Older than the dungeon. Probably hungrier.

name: Sapling Sentinel
description: Young treant. Walking shrub with grudges.

name: Mossback Treant
description: Mid-aged treant carpeted in moss. Fists like ramming logs.

name: Ancient Oakwarden
description: Centuries-old oak treant. Roots remember every footstep.

name: Restless Wraith
description: Pale, drifting spirit bound to a single tile. Cannot pursue, but reaches across the room to drain the living from afar.

name: Sorrow Wisp
description: Wandering spectre. Drains hope before it drains blood.

name: Hyena Whelp
description: Young gnoll, all teeth and yelps. Strongest in a pack.

name: Pack Stalker
description: Veteran gnoll hunter. Hits a flank you didn't know you had.

name: Sneak Goblin
description: Small, fast, mean. Daggers at the ready.

name: Goblin Scrapper
description: Bigger goblin with a bigger blade. Cocky.

name: Warband Boss
description: Goblin chief. Wears scavenged armor that almost fits.

name: Stone Sentinel
description: Carved-stone construct. Deals damage by existing.

name: Iron Behemoth
description: Iron-clad war golem. Slow as siege. Hits like one too.

name: Ember Imp
description: Pint-sized devil. Throws fistfuls of flame.

name: Shadow Imp
description: Imp wreathed in cold dark. Stings before you see it.

name: Plague Imp
description: Festering little imp. Carries every disease in the dungeon.

name: Bone Cleric
description: Robed undead spellcaster. Hangs back from melee and heals wounded undead allies in the same room.

name: Death Acolyte
description: Lich apprentice who chose offense over offering.

name: Marsh Stalker
description: Cold-blooded ambusher. Strikes from the reeds.

name: Scaled Hunter
description: Veteran lizardman with a wickedly curved blade.

name: Spore Sprite
description: Sentient cap. Releases a cloud of confusing spores when hit.

name: Toxic Cap
description: Larger fungal warrior. Spits acidic spores.

name: Orc Marauder
description: Wild-eyed orc with a heavy axe. No subtlety.

name: Warlord Orc
description: Battle-scarred orc commander. Hits hard, leads harder.

name: Vinekin
description: Creeping vine creature. Slows whatever brushes it.

name: Carnivore Bloom
description: Toothed flower the size of a man. Eats everything that walks.

name: Blood Briar
description: Thorned, blood-fed bramble. Heals when it draws blood.

name: Plague Rat
description: Diseased rat. Bites carry fever.

name: Sewer Skitterer
description: Faster, leaner rat. Travels in packs.

name: Dire Vermin
description: Wagon-sized rat. Should not be possible. Is anyway.

name: Risen Bones
description: A basic patrolling skeleton. Cheap, reliable, expendable.

name: Boneguard
description: Armored skeleton with shield and spear. Holds the line.

name: Grave Knight
description: Risen knight, sword still in hand. Remembers the day it fell.

name: Bomb Slime
description: Small blue slime. Bouncy. Wet. Aggressive.

name: Acid Slime
description: Sickly-green slime. Hisses where it splatters.

name: Toxic Slime
description: Purple poison slime. Apply liberally to adventurers.

name: Frost Slime
description: Chill slime. Slows what it touches.

name: Electric Slime
description: Glowing red slime. Burns on contact.

name: Demon Slime
description: Slime hardened with mineral shards. Surprisingly tough.

name: Crystal Slime
description: Light-eating black slime. Unsettlingly silent.

name: Death Slime
description: Murky brown slime full of swamp gas.

name: Lava Slime
description: Brilliant yellow slime. Painful to look at.

name: Vampire Spawn
description: Newly-turned vampire. Bites first, asks nothing. Heals from blood drawn.

name: Vampire Thrall
description: Charmed mortal turned vampire. Drains life. Doesn't sleep.

name: Shambler
description: Slow, mindless walking corpse. Cheap meat for the front line.

name: Plague Walker
description: Festering zombie. Bites carry rot.

name: Crypt Lord
description: Bloated, tomb-bound zombie. Devastating when it lands a hit.

name: Beholder Tyrant
description: Tyrant eye. Sees every plan, breaks every will.

name: Demon Lord
description: Crowned devil. Burns in three colors.

name: Dark Wraith
description: Sovereign of sorrow. Phases through grief and stone alike.

name: Gnoll Alpha
description: Pack alpha. Three teeth on the necklace, three more in your shoulder.

name: Golem Warden
description: Bound construct sentinel. Slow. Patient. Inevitable.

name: Elder Lich
description: Phylactery-bound archmage. Already dead, still annoyed.

name: Serpent Captain
description: Cold-blooded warband captain. The blade is sharper than the tongue.

name: Myconid Stalker
description: Sentient spore-keeper. Walks where the moss already remembers you.

name: Orc Veteran
description: Old-blood warlord. Survived a hundred raids. Made the hundred-and-first personal.

name: Vampire Sovereign
description: Old blood, older title. Charms with one hand, opens veins with the other.

name: Mimic
description: Disguised as a random chest (you see a red tint; adventurers don’t). Instakills anyone who loots it. Re-disguises each night.
Cave Spinner. Strings the dark with web and snares whatever brushes it.
Web Lurker. Bigger, patient, faster to bind.
Broodmother. Floods a room with webbing — nothing crosses at speed.
Goblin Drummer. Hangs back and beats the war-rhythm — nearby minions hit harder.
War Drummer. The cadence quickens; the warband answers.
Warlord Herald. Its banner turns a room of minions into an army.
Bone Totem. Rooted in place, it keeps belching up a trickle of swarmlings.
Hex Pylon. The trickle becomes a stream.
Necro Obelisk. An endless font of bodies — kill it or drown.
A summoned husk. Weak alone, a problem in numbers.
Rust Gremlin. Corrodes armor on contact and leaves a smear of acid in its wake.
Corrosion Imp. The smear becomes a trail; the armor becomes scrap.
Rust Tyrant. Walks a room into ruin — floors slick, armor gone.
